predicates.name: provides_proof_of_belgian_nationality
predicates.description: The person provides proof that they hold Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_foreigner
predicates.description: The person is a foreigner because they do not provide proof of Belgian nationality.

predicates.name: is_citizen_of_union
predicates.description: The person is a citizen of the European Union.

predicates.name: falls_under_community_free_movement_law
predicates.description: The person falls under Community law on free movement as defined in Article 2, point 5, of the Schengen Borders Code.

predicates.name: is_third_country_national
predicates.description: The person is a national of a third country: not a Union citizen and not covered by Community free movement law.

predicates.name: present_on_territory
predicates.description: The foreigner is present on the territory.

predicates.name: satisfies_conditions_for_access_or_residence
predicates.description: The foreigner satisfies the conditions for access to or residence on the territory.

predicates.name: in_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The foreigner is in illegal residence on the territory.

predicates.name: reasons_to_believe_will_abscond
predicates.description: There are reasons to believe that the foreigner will abscond.

predicates.name: subject_to_removal_or_protection_procedure
predicates.description: The foreigner is subject to a removal procedure, a procedure for granting international protection, or a procedure for determining or transferring to the responsible Member State.

predicates.name: individual_examination_performed
predicates.description: An individual examination has been performed for the foreigner.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding_is_current_and_real
predicates.description: The risk of absconding for the foreigner is current and real.

predicates.name: at_least_one_objective_criterion_present
predicates.description: At least one of the objective absconding criteria listed in paragraph 2 is present for the foreigner.

predicates.name: risk_of_absconding
predicates.description: A risk of absconding exists for the foreigner.

predicates.name: has_valid_travel_document
predicates.description: The foreigner is in possession of a valid travel document, valid passport, or valid identity document.

predicates.name: recognised_as_national_by_authority_willing_to_issue_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The foreigner has been recognised as a national by the national authority of their country and that authority has declared itself willing to issue a laissez-passer.

predicates.name: falls_under_nationality_category_for_ministerial_laissez_passer
predicates.description: The foreigner falls under a category of nationalities for which the minister may issue a laissez-passer directly.

predicates.name: is_identified_foreigner
predicates.description: The foreigner is an identified foreigner based on possession of valid documents or recognition by national authority.

predicates.name: criterion_failure_to_apply
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on failure to apply is present: the foreigner did not submit a residence or international protection application within the required period.

predicates.name: did_not_submit_residence_application_after_illegal_entry_or_during_illegal_residence
predicates.description: The foreigner did not submit a residence application after illegal entry or during illegal residence.

predicates.name: did_not_submit_protection_application_within_legal_period
predicates.description: The foreigner did not submit an application for international protection within the period provided by law.

predicates.name: criterion_fraud
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on fraud is present: the foreigner used false information, falsified documents, or other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: used_false_or_misleading_information_or_documents
predicates.description: The foreigner used false or misleading information, false or falsified documents, committed fraud, or used other unlawful means in a relevant procedure.

predicates.name: criterion_non_cooperation
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on non-cooperation is present: the foreigner does not or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for access, residence, establishment, and removal.

predicates.name: does_not_cooperate_with_authorities
predicates.description: The foreigner does not cooperate or has not cooperated with authorities responsible for implementing or supervising regulations on access, residence, establishment, and removal.

predicates.name: criterion_non_compliance_with_measures
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on non-compliance with measures is present: the foreigner has indicated unwillingness or has failed to comply with a transfer, pushback, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or freedom-restricting measure.

predicates.name: indicated_non_compliance_with_transfer_pushback_removal
predicates.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness or has already failed to comply with a transfer, pushback, or removal measure.

predicates.name: indicated_non_compliance_with_entry_ban
predicates.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness or has already failed to comply with an entry ban that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: indicated_non_compliance_with_less_coercive_measure
predicates.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness or has already failed to comply with a less coercive measure aimed at guaranteeing transfer, pushback, or removal.

predicates.name: indicated_non_compliance_with_freedom_restricting_measure
predicates.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness or has already failed to comply with a freedom-restricting measure aimed at guaranteeing public order or national security.

predicates.name: indicated_non_compliance_with_equivalent_measure_other_member_state
predicates.description: The foreigner has clearly indicated unwillingness or has already failed to comply with a measure taken by another Member State equivalent to a transfer, pushback, removal, entry ban, less coercive, or freedom-restricting measure.

predicates.name: criterion_entry_ban
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on entry ban is present: the foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: subject_to_unlifted_entry_ban
predicates.description: The foreigner is subject to an entry ban in the Kingdom and/or in another Member State that has neither been lifted nor suspended.

predicates.name: criterion_new_application_after_decision
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on new application after decision is present: the foreigner submitted a new application immediately after a refusal, end-of-residence, or removal decision.

predicates.name: submitted_new_application_after_negative_decision
predicates.description: The foreigner submitted a new residence or international protection application immediately after a decision refusing entry or residence, ending residence, or imposing pushback or removal.

predicates.name: criterion_concealment_of_fingerprints
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on concealment of fingerprints is present: the foreigner concealed having provided fingerprints in another Dublin-bound State.

predicates.name: concealed_fingerprints_in_other_state
predicates.description: The foreigner, when questioned, concealed that they had already provided fingerprints in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State for international protection applications.

predicates.name: criterion_multiple_applications
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on multiple applications is present: the foreigner submitted multiple protection or residence applications resulting in negative decisions or no permit.

predicates.name: submitted_multiple_applications_with_negative_outcome
predicates.description: The foreigner submitted multiple applications for international protection and/or residence in the Kingdom or other Member States, resulting in negative decisions or no residence permit.

predicates.name: criterion_concealment_of_prior_application
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on concealment of prior application is present: the foreigner concealed having previously submitted an international protection application in another Dublin-bound State.

predicates.name: concealed_prior_application_in_other_state
predicates.description: The foreigner, when questioned, concealed that they had previously submitted an application for international protection in another State bound by European regulations on determining the responsible State.

predicates.name: criterion_declared_purpose
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on declared purpose is present: the foreigner declared or it appears from their file that they came for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application.

predicates.name: came_for_purposes_other_than_application
predicates.description: The foreigner declared, or it appears from their file, that they came to the Kingdom for purposes other than those for which they submitted an application for international protection or a residence application.

predicates.name: criterion_manifestly_unfounded_appeal
predicates.description: The absconding criterion based on manifestly unfounded appeal is present: the foreigner is subject to a fine for submitting a manifestly unlawful appeal before the Council for Alien Law Litigation.

predicates.name: subject_to_fine_for_manifestly_unlawful_appeal
predicates.description: The foreigner is subject to a fine because they submitted a manifestly unlawful appeal before the Council for Alien Law Litigation.
